highlights: Pizza Chef Sion, Pasta Maker Illaoi, Breadsticks Irelia, Spaghetti alla Vel'Koz, Eternal Aspect Leona, Eternal Aspect Diana, and Eclipse Eternal Aspect Diana will be available May 28, 2026.

S.reason: Massive damage buffs scaling with bonus Magic Resistance make him the top anti-mage.
Sizable Burst Fire base damage buffs and R duration extension allow her to dominate late teamfights.
Longer clone duration (4s) and nimbus strike AS buff elevate his jungle skirmishing power.

A.reason: Max health damage shifts early and higher healing percentages keep her incredibly robust.
Safeguard ward-hops now granting shield and flat 7s cooldown unlock high dynamic mobility.
Severe R mana cost reductions and new bonus monster damage make her a flexible map threat.

B.reason: Nerfed passive health damage and lower shadow slash scaling, but still extremely mobile.
Minor utility Q damage multiplier tap-down (140% to 130%), remaining a strong secondary carry.
Early game base damage nerf compensated by crit multiplier increases, scaling well into late game.
